situation_summary: CFO initiated vendor review. Explicit competitor evaluation underway (Gainsight). ROI questioned in executive email. 47 days to renewal.
action_taken: Executive business review with CFO and CEO. Custom ROI dashboard built showing $62K in recovered productivity. Gainsight comparison slide presented. Automation module live demo.
outcome: Renewed at same ARR. Competitor evaluation dropped. CFO sent internal endorsement email post-EBR.
csm_notes: ROI quantification was the decisive factor. CFO did not want features — they wanted dollar numbers. Build the ROI case before the EBR, not during it. Bring VP CS to the call for credibility.
